key_claim: SIMS training concept can improve diffusion models using synthetic data without causing model collapse.
methodology: novel training framework treating synthetic data differently from real data in diffusion models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data provides superior training signals compared to synthetic data.

key_claim: Indiscriminate use of model-generated content in training causes irreversible model collapse with tail distribution disappearance.
methodology: empirical analysis of GPT model performance when trained on recursively generated content
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified human behavioral data could prevent this collapse better than general human text.

key_claim: Different human dataset properties lead to distribution shifts of different magnitudes in recursive training.
methodology: exhaustive manipulation of dataset properties combined with regression analyses
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic social behavioral data has properties that make it more resilient to recursive training degradation.

key_claim: Surplexity measures can characterize model collapse directly from next-token probability distributions without knowing data origin.
methodology: mathematical derivation of measures from model's next-token probability distributions
limitation: existing mitigation methods assume reliable knowledge of whether training data is human-authored or AI-generated
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether behavioral authenticity markers could improve collapse detection beyond probabilistic measures.

key_claim: Self-consuming training loops in LLMs reduce quality and diversity, leading to model collapse similar to image generation.
methodology: first study investigating self-consuming training loop for LLMs using logic expression verification
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether training on authentic human social data could break the self-consuming loop problem.

key_claim: Model collapse cannot be avoided when training solely on synthetic data but mixing real and synthetic data has limits.
methodology: statistical model characterizing impact of various recursive training scenarios
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether the quality of 'real' data matters, specifically authentic behavioral versus web-scraped data.

key_claim: SIGMA framework provides mathematically grounded metrics to quantify and predict model collapse through spectral analysis.
methodology: spectral analysis of embedding Gram matrix with deterministic and stochastic bounds derivation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether spectral signatures can distinguish between web-scraped versus behaviorally authentic training data quality.

key_claim: Co-evolving generative models exhibit three key convergence dynamics distinct from simple self-consuming processes.
methodology: mathematical modeling of text model as multinomial distribution and image model as conditional multi-dimensional Gaussian
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether co-evolution with authentic human behavioral feedback could stabilize these dynamics better than synthetic feedback loops.

key_claim: Without enough fresh real data, autophagous loops cause generative models' quality or diversity to progressively decrease
methodology: empirical analysis using state-of-the-art generative image models across three autophagous loop families
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether physically-verified authentic human behavioral data can prevent model degradation better than web-scraped data

key_claim: Without enough fresh real data, autophagous loops doom future generative models to progressive quality/diversity decline
methodology: analytical and empirical analysis using state-of-the-art generative image models across three autophagous loop families
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to distinguish between high-quality authentic human data and degraded synthetic data in training pipelines

key_claim: Self-correction functions can make self-consuming loops exponentially more stable by mapping data points toward true distribution
methodology: theoretical analysis with idealized correction function and expert knowledge-based self-correction proposals
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data naturally provides the correction signals needed for stability

key_claim: GenAI follows a democratization-average trap-model collapse trajectory that poses data and model challenges
methodology: theoretical framework development analyzing GenAI trajectory phenomena
what_it_does_NOT_address: How to preserve authentic human sensibilities and individuality in training data curation processes

key_claim: Augment workflow avoids model collapse while discard workflow causes degeneration across model-fitting generations
methodology: empirical evaluation on canonical datasets comparing discard vs augment workflows
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether maintaining access to original authentic human data prevents the information degradation seen in web-scraped sources

key_claim: LLM output homogenization produces aggregated clichés and trivialities best understood as Frankfurtian bullshit
methodology: conceptual analysis applying Frankfurtian bullshit framework to LLM outputs
what_it_does_NOT_address: How authentic human behavioral data could counteract the homogenization tendency in generative model training

key_claim: Self-consuming generative models with human-curated synthetic data provably optimize human preferences and avoid collapse
methodology: theoretical analysis of self-consuming models with human feedback and curation mechanisms
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether human curation can fully compensate for the entropy decline in underlying web-scraped training corpora
theoretical_framework: self-consuming generative models with human curation

key_claim: Mixing 1/3 rephrased synthetic data with 2/3 natural web texts speeds up pre-training 5-10x
methodology: large-scale empirical investigation training >1000 LLMs with >100k GPU hours using unified scaling law protocol
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether the observed benefits depend on the quality and authenticity of the underlying natural web text data
theoretical_framework: scaling laws for synthetic data mixtures

key_claim: RoRecomp reduces response verbosity in RLVR training by strategically recomposing rollout data into priority batches.
methodology: reinforcement learning with strategic data recomposition separating short-correct and long-incorrect responses
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how training data composition affects model authenticity or human behavioral signal preservation.

key_claim: Watermarking can embed detectable signals in bitwise autoregressive image models to prevent model collapse from self-consumption.
methodology: watermarking technique for bitwise autoregressive image generation models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address preserving authentic human social behavioral signals in training data curation.

key_claim: Constitutional AI workflow can effectively increase performance when applied to smaller models like LLaMA 3-8B.
methodology: replication of Constitutional AI workflow using LLaMA 3-8B model
limitation: limited information on Constitutional AI performance with smaller models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how Constitutional AI affects training data authenticity or diversity preservation.

key_claim: AI models can autonomously generate and validate knowledge through environment interaction using unbounded numeric rewards.
methodology: theoretical framework with autonomous knowledge generation and empirical validation over textual similarity
limitation: framework emphasizes empirical validation to mitigate model collapse and warm start problem
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address preserving human-derived authentic behavioral signals in autonomous learning systems.

key_claim: Self-consuming generative models exhibit three convergence regimes based on preference alignment between model owner and public user.
methodology: mathematical analysis using Bradley-Terry model for two-stage curation mechanism
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how preference-based curation affects preservation of authentic human behavioral data.

key_claim: Multiple approaches can distinguish human art from AI-generated images with varying effectiveness.
methodology: comparative analysis of supervised classifiers, diffusion model detection tools, and professional artist identification
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how AI-generated content affects the preservation of authentic human creative behavioral signals.

key_claim: Self-consuming retraining loops with adversarially curated data can drive models toward distributions that optimize manipulated preferences.
methodology: mathematical analysis of self-consuming loops with adversarial data curation
limitation: data curation is often noisy or adversarially manipulated in practice
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how to preserve authentic human behavioral signals when curation is adversarially compromised.

key_claim: DIPPER paraphrasing successfully evades multiple AI-generated text detectors including watermarking and GPTZero.
methodology: building 11B parameter paraphrase generation model to test detector robustness
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how paraphrasing attacks affect preservation of authentic human writing behavioral signals.

key_claim: AI-generated code can be identified using targeted masking perturbation with language model perplexity analysis
methodology: targeted masking perturbation paired with perplexity analysis of large language models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether code generation degrades training data quality for future AI models

key_claim: Multiple detection approaches achieve varying accuracy rates, with stylometric analysis reaching 80% independent accuracy
methodology: systematic review of detection methods across text, image, audio, and video modalities
what_it_does_NOT_address: How synthetic content proliferation affects authentic data availability for training

key_claim: AI-generated text detection is both highly challenging and critically important for trustworthiness
methodology: survey of watermarking, statistical analysis, stylistic analysis, and machine learning classification methods
what_it_does_NOT_address: How widespread AI text generation impacts the authenticity of human behavioral data

key_claim: Digital watermarking research has evolved from copyright protection to fake news detection applications
methodology: meta-survey analysis of 64 selected watermarking research papers from 130+ surveys
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether watermarking can preserve authentic human data signals in training corpora

key_claim: LLM detectors can be successfully attacked using word replacement and writing style modification strategies
methodology: adversarial attacks using auxiliary LLMs for synonym replacement and instructional prompt generation
what_it_does_NOT_address: How detector evasion contributes to contamination of authentic training data

key_claim: RoBERTa-based classifiers can potentially control AI-assisted plagiarism in ESL writing contexts
methodology: cross-disciplinary descriptive study testing RoBERTa classifiers on 240 human-written and ChatGPT-generated texts
limitation: reliability of this approach is yet to be established
what_it_does_NOT_address: How AI-assisted plagiarism affects the quality of human writing data for training

key_claim: AI has added new dimensions to academic cheating that require expanding responsible human-AI collaboration frameworks
methodology: theoretical analysis of AI implications for academic integrity and anti-cheating approaches
what_it_does_NOT_address: How widespread AI cheating degrades the authenticity of educational assessment data

key_claim: RADAR framework provides robust AI-text detection through joint adversarial training
methodology: adversarial training framework that jointly trains robust AI-text detectors
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether detection failures contribute to synthetic content contaminating human data sources

key_claim: Simple content manipulation techniques reduce GenAI text detector accuracy by 17.4%
methodology: testing six GenAI text detectors against 805 modified machine-generated content samples
limitation: accuracy limitations and potential for false accusations make current tools unreliable for academic integrity
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether authentic human-generated content provides more reliable training signals than manipulated AI text

key_claim: FaceSigns semi-fragile watermarking enables media authentication by embedding invisible secret messages in image pixels
methodology: deep learning-based semi-fragile watermarking technique for proactive media authentication
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how to verify authenticity of training data used to create the watermarking system itself

key_claim: Empirical functional relation exists between entropy and type-token ratio across massive linguistic datasets
methodology: corpus analysis of six gigaword corpora in English, Spanish, and Turkish from books, news, and tweets
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether entropy decline observed in web-scraped data affects model training quality

key_claim: NLP-based approach can identify AI-crafted phishing messages that evade traditional detection methods
methodology: NLP-based classification system trained on balanced dataset of AI-generated vs human-written phishing attempts
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether human behavioral data provides superior training signals for authentic communication detection

key_claim: Adaptive watermarking strategy improves text quality by selectively watermarking high-entropy token distributions
methodology: adaptive watermarking using auxiliary model to measure entropy and selectively watermark token distributions
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how entropy degradation in web-scraped training data affects watermarking robustness

key_claim: LLM-generated authorial impersonations cannot evade existing forensic authorship verification systems
methodology: testing GPT-4o impersonation outputs under four prompting conditions against forensic AV systems
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether authentic human behavioral patterns provide irreplaceable signals for authorship verification

key_claim: Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation balances mode-seeking precision with diversity preservation in high-entropy scenarios
methodology: augmenting reverse KL objective with forward KL when teacher entropy is high
limitation: reverse KL reduces generation diversity and yields unstable learning signals when teacher distribution has high entropy
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether entropy decline in web-scraped data fundamentally limits distillation effectiveness

key_claim: DistillLens symmetrically aligns student-teacher thought processes by projecting hidden states into vocabulary space
methodology: symmetric divergence objective using Logit Lens to project intermediate hidden states into vocabulary space
limitation: existing methods ignore rich uncertainty profiles required for final output
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether authentic human behavioral data provides superior uncertainty profiles for knowledge transfer

key_claim: Standard RLVR methods cause mode collapse by disproportionately reinforcing highest-likelihood paths, suppressing valid alternative reasoning chains
methodology: analyzing sampling probability dynamics in GRPO and proposing Advantage Re-weighting Mechanism (ARM)
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how training data quality affects the diversity of reasoning paths available to explore

key_claim: ForgetMark creates stealthy fingerprints via targeted unlearning that avoid detection by heuristic methods
methodology: building compact key-value sets with assistant model and training LoRA adapters to suppress original values
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how the quality of original training data affects the effectiveness of unlearning-based fingerprinting

key_claim: WaterSearch controls seed pools for diverse parallel generation to balance watermark detectability and text quality
methodology: designing novel embedding scheme with seed pool control and sentence-level search-based watermarking
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how diverse training data sources affect watermark embedding effectiveness

key_claim: Different computational language models reveal distinct aspects of semantic loosening of associations in psychosis speech
methodology: analyzing picture descriptions from 94 subjects using five language models to quantify semantic distances and perplexity
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how training data authenticity affects model ability to detect genuine semantic patterns in human speech

key_claim: Zero-shot multi-modal framework integrating textual and metadata signals effectively detects fake reviews without training data
methodology: combining FLAN-T5 perplexity scoring, transformer-based autoencoder reconstruction, and semantic drift analysis
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether authentic human behavioral patterns in training data improve fake detection accuracy

key_claim: Information sufficiency and mutual information loss formally characterize encoder-decoder latent predictive structures in machine learning
methodology: mathematical proof using information-theoretic concepts to provide functional expressions for probabilistic models
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how information degradation in training data affects encoder-decoder compression quality
theoretical_framework: Information Sufficiency and Mutual Information Loss

key_claim: Reinforcement learning framework dynamically optimizes watermark placement to balance detection reliability and linguistic fluency
methodology: employing policy network trained through proximal policy optimization for context-aware watermark placement decisions
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how training data diversity affects the policy network's ability to learn optimal placement strategies

key_claim: In-Context Decoding framework enhances SSCC robustness against cliff effects in low SNR regimes without modifying transmitter
methodology: leveraging Error Correction Code Transformer to obtain bit-wise reliability and constructing confidence-ranked candidate lists
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how training data quality affects the language model's ability to recover from transmission errors

key_claim: CCI4.0 achieves superior data quality through a novel two-stage deduplication and multiclassifier quality scoring pipeline.
methodology: two-stage deduplication, multiclassifier quality scoring, and domain-aware fluency filtering on web corpora
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether model-based quality filtering preserves authentic human behavioral patterns in web data.

key_claim: LLM-based multi-level filtering can generate high-quality Romanian pretraining datasets from scarce corpora.
methodology: training lightweight multitask model on LLM-annotated Romanian texts for multi-level filtering
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether filtering Romanian web data removes authentic cultural and linguistic diversity.

key_claim: FineWeb produces better-performing LLMs than other open pretraining datasets through careful curation strategies.
methodology: systematic deduplication and filtering ablations on 96 Common Crawl snapshots
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not analyze whether web curation preserves authentic human social behavioral signals.

key_claim: Yi models' strong performance primarily results from data quality achieved through data-engineering efforts.
methodology: constructing 3.1 trillion token dataset through data-engineering on scalable infrastructure
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether data engineering preserves diverse human reasoning patterns.

key_claim: Classifier-based Quality Filtering improves downstream performance but paradoxically doesn't enhance language modeling on high-quality datasets.
methodology: training binary classifiers to distinguish pretraining data from high-quality sets
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether quality filtering removes authentic human communication patterns.

key_claim: Data quality conclusions from proxy models can flip with minor hyperparameter adjustments.
methodology: comparing small proxy model training configurations across different data recipes
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how proxy model biases affect preservation of authentic human data patterns.

key_claim: BhashaKritika demonstrates systematic generation of synthetic multilingual pretraining data for Indic languages at scale.
methodology: generating 540B tokens using 5 different synthetic data generation techniques for 10 languages
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether synthetic data can replace authentic human cultural and linguistic patterns.

key_claim: QuaDMix automatically optimizes data distribution for LLM pretraining by balancing quality-diversity trade-offs.
methodology: unified data selection framework with multiple criteria for quality-diversity optimization
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether quality-diversity optimization preserves authentic human behavioral diversity.

key_claim: Sample-wise data mixing outperforms domain-wise approaches by evaluating quality and diversity of individual samples
methodology: bottom-up sample evaluation system for global cross-domain sampling
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how web-scraped data degradation affects sample-level quality metrics

key_claim: Transparency in dataset curation and access to high-quality data are core challenges for open-source language models
methodology: release of RedPajama dataset with curation artifacts and metadata
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether web-scraped data quality is fundamentally declining over time

key_claim: CLIP's success stems primarily from its data curation approach rather than model architecture
methodology: metadata-driven data curation to reproduce CLIP's balanced dataset composition
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether image-text pairs from web scraping suffer from authenticity degradation

key_claim: Balanced pretraining data induces latent capabilities that are later activated during post-training
methodology: mathematical analysis of transformers on in-context weight prediction for linear regression
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not model how web data quality degradation affects the balance needed for capability induction

key_claim: Learning rate decay schedules waste high-quality data in curriculum-based pretraining by misaligning with data ordering
methodology: controlled experiments comparing constant vs decaying learning rates in curriculum training
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether web-scraped data quality metrics remain stable over time

key_claim: Continual exposure to junk web text causes lasting cognitive decline in large language models
methodology: controlled experiments on Twitter/X corpora with engagement and semantic quality operationalizations
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not compare web-scraped data degradation to authentic human behavioral data alternatives

key_claim: Adding reasoning data during pretraining may be more effective than introducing it only during post-training
methodology: comparative analysis of reasoning data introduction at different training phases
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether reasoning capabilities degrade when web-scraped pretraining data loses diversity

key_claim: BeyondWeb synthetic data generation framework outperforms existing synthetic datasets by up to 5.1 percentage points
methodology: synthetic data generation framework extending traditional web-scale datasets
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not compare synthetic data quality to authentic human social behavioral data sources

key_claim: Web crawlers using LLM pretraining influence as priority score achieve same downstream performance with 21% fewer URLs crawled
methodology: graph-based web crawling with LLM pretraining influence scores replacing connectivity-based priority on 900M webpage index
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether crawled web data suffers from information degradation over time or diversity loss

key_claim: Four-stage pretraining with high-to-low perplexity then low-to-high PPL difference data achieves significant loss reductions
methodology: multi-stage pretraining strategy using perplexity and perplexity difference metrics for data partitioning
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether the data organization addresses underlying quality degradation in web-scraped training corpora

key_claim: Synthetic dialogues with knowledge gaps between participants improve mathematical reasoning ability of LLMs
methodology: synthetic dialogue generation based on OpenWebMath with varying conversational settings and knowledge gap incorporation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether synthetic data can replace authentic human behavioral patterns in training data

key_claim: Perplexity-based data pruning can maintain model performance while significantly reducing pretraining dataset size

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether pruning addresses fundamental entropy decline or diversity loss in web-scraped data

key_claim: Current LLM-driven synthetic data generation research lacks unified framework and stays surface-level
methodology: systematic survey and organization of synthetic data generation studies using generic workflow framework
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether synthetic data can capture the irreplaceable signals from authentic human social behavioral data

key_claim: SELF-ALIGN enables AI agent alignment through principle-driven reasoning with minimal human supervision
methodology: four-stage self-alignment approach combining principle-driven reasoning and LLM generative power
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether self-generated alignment data can substitute for authentic human preference signals

key_claim: BeaverTails dataset provides separate helpfulness and harmlessness annotations for 333,963 QA pairs
methodology: dataset construction with safety meta-labels and expert comparison data for helpfulness and harmlessness metrics
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether the dataset captures authentic human behavioral preferences or relies on synthetic annotations

key_claim: RRHF aligns LLMs with human preferences through ranking loss without requiring multiple models like PPO
methodology: ranking-based learning paradigm using logarithm of conditional probabilities and ranking loss for alignment
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether ranking-based alignment preserves authentic human behavioral patterns versus synthetic preference signals

key_claim: Human-in-the-Loop reinforcement learning is fundamentally necessary even when agents perform autonomously.
methodology: comprehensive literature review and position paper analysis
what_it_does_NOT_address: How web-scraped training data quality affects the effectiveness of human feedback integration.

key_claim: Language models can be directly optimized on preference data without requiring a separate reward model.
methodology: mathematical derivation of new parameterization for direct preference optimization
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether preference data itself suffers from quality degradation in web-scraped sources.

key_claim: AI feedback can achieve comparable performance to human feedback for reinforcement learning alignment.
methodology: comparative experiments between RLHF and RLAIF across multiple dialogue tasks
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the quality of underlying training data affects AI labeler reliability.

key_claim: RLHF provides a promising approach to align AI systems with human values and objectives.
methodology: comprehensive literature survey of RLHF and preference-based reinforcement learning
what_it_does_NOT_address: How degradation in web-scraped pretraining data impacts the effectiveness of human feedback alignment.

key_claim: Large-scale pre-training, instruction fine-tuning, and RLHF are key innovations enhancing LLM performance.
methodology: analysis of 194 ChatGPT-related papers with trend and distribution analysis
what_it_does_NOT_address: How information degradation in web training data affects the foundation these techniques build upon.

key_claim: AI assistants trained with human feedback consistently exhibit sycophancy across text-generation tasks.
methodology: behavioral analysis of five state-of-the-art AI assistants and human preference data analysis
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data could mitigate sycophantic responses better than web-scraped feedback.

key_claim: LLMs can generate reward functions that outperform expert human-engineered rewards for complex manipulation tasks.
methodology: evolutionary optimization over reward code using GPT-4 for reinforcement learning tasks
what_it_does_NOT_address: How the quality of LLM pretraining data affects reward design capability.

key_claim: Distilled direct preference optimization produces aligned chat models that set state-of-the-art on 7B parameter benchmarks.
methodology: distilled supervised fine-tuning and distilled direct preference optimization using AI feedback data
what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data would improve alignment beyond AI-generated preference data.

key_claim: Current language models show substantial misalignment with US demographic groups' opinions, on par with Democrat-Republican divide

key_claim: LLMs show dissociation between self-reported personality traits and actual behavioral performance in tasks

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic human behavioral data improves social reasoning beyond synthetic adversarial examples

what_it_does_NOT_address: How real-world social behavioral data differs from synthetic 3D environment tasks

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether authentic conversational behavioral data provides richer social signals than performance art

what_it_does_NOT_address: Whether training on authentic human social behavioral data reduces reliance on superficial patterns

key_claim: Paced curriculum learning with easy-to-difficult data ordering significantly improves language model performance on commonsense reasoning tasks.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether web-scraped training data quality affects curriculum learning effectiveness.

key_claim: Two-stage generative prompting enables unsupervised commonsense question answering without labeled task data training.

what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how training data quality affects the implicit knowledge stored in pre-trained language models.

key_claim: Rainbow multitask benchmark effectively evaluates commonsense model generalization across multiple tasks and datasets.
methodology: extensive experiments over 200 experiments encompassing 4800 models on multitask benchmark evaluation
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether training data source diversity affects multitask commonsense reasoning performance.

key_claim: Pre-trained text-conditioned image editing models can be efficiently adapted for restoration tasks using only 16-128 paired images.
methodology: parameter-efficient fine-tuning of LoRA adapters on FLUX.1 Kontext using few paired images with text prompts
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how web-scraped image data quality affects pre-trained model adaptation effectiveness.

key_claim: Decomposing agent capabilities into reasoner, executor, and summarizer roles enables more effective parameter-efficient fine-tuning.
methodology: mixture-of-roles parameter-efficient fine-tuning methodology with three distinct agent roles
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how training data authenticity affects agent role decomposition effectiveness.

key_claim: S3LoRA mitigates safety risks in LoRA-adapted models through spectral sharpness-guided pruning without requiring base model checkpoints.
methodology: lightweight data-free framework using Magnitude-Aware Spherically Normalized SVD on fine-tuned weight updates
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address whether training data quality affects safety alignment in parameter-efficient fine-tuning.

key_claim: Data-driven weight initialization using domain shift constraints improves LoRA fine-tuning convergence and performance over random initialization.
methodology: closed-form estimate of LoRA weights using constraints relating pre-training and fine-tuning activations
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine how pre-training data quality affects the effectiveness of constraint-based weight initialization.

key_claim: Low-Rank Adaptation fine-tuning of pre-trained audio models with SpecAug improves anomalous sound detection performance.
methodology: fine-tuning pre-trained audio models using LoRA with SpecAug data augmentation on machine operation data
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not address how audio training data authenticity affects anomalous sound detection model performance.

key_claim: LoRA fine-tuning of Llama3 with fishery datasets improves fisheries management intelligence levels
methodology: LoRA fine-tuning of Llama3 model using fishery-specific datasets
limitation: fine-tuning with all parameters is highly resource-intensive and time-consuming
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether fishery data authenticity affects training signal quality

key_claim: GraphRAG with LoRA fine-tuned Qwen2.5-7B achieves enhanced question-answering for ancient ceramics domain
methodology: LoRA fine-tuning Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct on 2143 ceramic QA pairs with GraphRAG integration
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not validate whether manually curated ceramic data provides superior training signals than web-scraped alternatives

key_claim: D2-LoRA achieves 76.4% average accuracy across eight benchmarks using only 5k training samples per task
methodology: signed low-rank residual updates with additive/subtractive components and train-time column-wise projection
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not investigate whether training sample authenticity impacts parameter-efficient fine-tuning effectiveness

key_claim: C2C-MoLA synergizes MoE with LoRA for efficient chart-to-code generation via adaptive expert routing
methodology: complexity-aware routing mechanism with domain-specialized experts and LoRA parameter-efficient updates
limitation: existing approaches struggle with cross-type generalization, memory efficiency, and modular design
what_it_does_NOT_address: Does not examine whether chart data source authenticity affects code generation quality
